data.title: Spectrum Brands Holdings to reveal Q1 2026 results on Feb 5, 2026, after period ended Dec 28, 2025. Conducting live call and webcast.
data.description: In Middleton, Wisconsin, Spectrum Brands Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: SPB) disclosed its plan to unveil its financial results for the fiscal 2026 first quarter. The results, covering the period up to December 28, 2025, will be made public before the market opens on Thursday, February 5, 2026. Spectrum Brands, a prominent global company in consumer products and home essentials, emphasizes innovation and top-notch customer service. Alongside the results release, the company will host a live conference call and webcast on the specified date.

data.title: 2026 Forme highlighted for back health and alignment support in ergonomic wear due to increased discomfort from work and screens.
data.description: On January 22, 2026, in New York, a notable shift towards recognizing the impact of poor posture on physical health has led to a surge in the popularity of ergonomic clothing within the wellness industry. The prolonged periods of sitting at work, higher screen usage, and limited physical activity have led to a significant increase in cases of back strain. As a result, more people are turning to ergonomic apparel to address these issues and improve their overall well-being.

data.title: GoldMining Inc. appoints Martin Dumont as VP of Corporate Development and Investor Relations on Jan. 22, 2026.
data.description: GoldMining Inc. (TSX: GOLD; NYSE American: GLDG) in Vancouver, BC disclosed the recruitment of Martin Dumont as the new Vice President, Corporate Development & Investor Relations. This news was declared on Jan. 22, 2026. Alastair Still, the current President and Chief Executive Officer, welcomed Dumont to the team.

data.title: Target Corporation declares $1.14 quarterly dividend per common share, payable on March 1, 2026, to shareholders Feb 11.
data.description: Target Corporation recently announced a quarterly dividend of $1.14 per common share, approved by its board of directors. The dividend is scheduled to be paid on March 1, 2026, to shareholders who are officially recorded as of February 11, 2026. This decision comes as part of Target Corporation's first quarter initiatives.

data.title: Surf Air Mobility invests in Mokulele Airlines' Hawaii operations, aiming to bolster its airline network in Hawaii.
data.description: In Los Angeles, Surf Air Mobility Inc. (NYSE: SRFM) announced an operational update regarding its Mokulele Airlines business. Mokulele Airlines is identified as a key asset within Surf Air Mobility's Hawaii network. It was noted that Mokulele holds the title of operating the most extensive airline network in Hawaii based on the number of airports served. Additionally, the airline boasts the highest number of scheduled departures among commuter airlines in Hawaii. Surf Air Mobility reiterated its dedication to ongoing investment in expanding its Hawaii network.

data.title: Greenoaks and Altimeter file legal actions against Korea for discrimination against Coupang and U.S. companies.
data.description: In San Francisco, U.S. Investors Greenoaks and Altimeter have filed two separate legal actions to protect American businesses and investors from discriminatory practices by the Government of the Republic of Korea. This move comes after continuous interference by the ROK Government in the Korean operations of Coupang, Inc. (NYSE: CPNG), a U.S.-based technology company. Coupang is publicly traded, and its stock is widely held.

data.title: WEX Inc. (NYSE: WEX) to report Q4 and FY 2025 financial results on Feb 4, 2026 after market close. Supplemental materials available for investors.
data.description: Portland-based company WEX Inc. (NYSE: WEX) is set to reveal its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025 on Wednesday, February 4, 2026, after the market closes. Interested parties can access the press release and supplementary materials, containing specific information regarding the company's performance during the mentioned periods, on the investor relations section of their website on the same day. This disclosure comes as part of WEX Inc.'s commitment to providing transparency about its global commerce platform activities.

data.title: Goliath Resources achieves 100% ownership of Golddigger Property, reduces NSR from 3% to 2% by issuing 3,000,000 common shares.
data.description: Goliath Resources Limited has recently announced a favorable development regarding its property ownership agreement with The J2 Syndicate and J2 Syndicate Holdings Ltd. The company, listed on TSX-V as GOT and OTCQB as GOTRF, with Frankfurt listing as B4IF, is set to increase its ownership in the Golddigger Property in the Golden Triangle, B.C. The amendment will boost Goliath's ownership from 49% to 100% while decreasing the Syndicate's Net Smelter Returns from 3% to 2%. As part of the deal, Goliath will issue 3,000,000 common shares to the Syndicate by March 15, 2026. The agreement is pending approval from TSXV.

data.title: Bitcoin struggles to reach $90,000, facing institutional outflows. Bitcoin ETFs saw $708.7 million outflows, Ethereum ETFs $287 million. Shift to bearish trend noted by analysts.
data.description: Despite President Trump's pause on proposed tariffs, Bitcoin struggled to reach the $90,000 mark due to ongoing institutional outflows. Bitcoin ETFs experienced net outflows of $708.7 million, while Ethereum ETFs saw net outflows of $287 million on Thursday. According to Trader CryptosBatman, Bitcoin has fallen below its bullish trendline and is currently undergoing a minor retest. The breakdown indicates a shift to a bearish bias unless the trendline is reclaimed decisively. For more details, please visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Asset manager with $18B seeks SEC approval to convert $6B Treasury ETF to token on blockchain, following Wall Street trend.
data.description: F/m Investments is requesting relief from the SEC to officially document ownership of its Treasury ETF worth $6 billion on a permissioned blockchain. This move comes as tokenization becomes more prevalent on Wall Street.

data.title: Epson unveils SureColor G9070 direct-to-film printer, featuring 64-inch width, twin-roll, and auto maintenance for efficiency.
data.description: Epson has recently unveiled a cutting-edge 64-inch wide DTFilm printer at the Impressions Expo in Long Beach, California on January 22, 2026. This innovative printer offers twin-roll flexibility as well as automatic maintenance features, setting new standards for efficiency and reliability in the industry. This introduction marks Epson's pioneering step in expanding its SureColor® line of products. The printer's advanced features aim to streamline operations and enhance output quality for businesses and professionals in need of high-performance printing solutions. Visit Booth #449 at the event to witness this groundbreaking technology firsthand.

data.title: 75th Spielwarenmesse in Nuremberg from Jan 27-31, 2026, with retailers, manufacturers, media celebrating in an extra-special event.
data.description: The city of Nuremberg in Germany is hosting the prestigious Spielwarenmesse event from January 27 to 31, 2026, to mark its 75th anniversary. The event will bring together key players in the toy industry including retailers, manufacturers, and media. Known as a top B2B gathering, this event is expected to draw significant attention with a large number of attendees participating.
